shows.name: rivb.
shows.desc: rib continues! Every week, a different theme. rib is loved all over both for dj rib's on-air personality and the honed selection of tunes.

shows.name: What
shows.desc:
- What's on?
What.
- What?
No, what's on.
- What's on?
What?

shows.name: Drop Table
shows.desc: Drop Table is a tastemaker show, with DJs curro and Niko putting in crazy effort every week to bring deep selects from the "hyperpop" scene. Combined with their unhinged back and forth and their growing slate of interview guests, it's something you don't want to miss.

shows.name: CyberTrance
shows.desc: Speaking of tastemakers! dotdom has every week killed it with a live DJ set of trance, techno, and hard dance. It's always a jam.

shows.name: DDR22000
shows.desc: A more relaxed followup to Cybertrance, DDR22000 offers a look into anything and everything electronic -- ambient, breakbeat, everything in between. If it's in blue colors, it can show up.

shows.name: Sunny Side Up
shows.desc: Sunny Side Up is a comfortable talk show, aimed at instilling positive energies and talking about improving mental health. It's a nice hang-out of a show for the early night. I know this doesn't translate into radio, but they have a dog too. That's pretty cool.

shows.name: The Prog Peddler Presents: Albums with Alex
shows.desc: Albums with Alex is a listening party show, which sees the Peddler venture through many of his favorite albums (not just prog!) and talk about their personal relevance to him. It's a very authentic show, and might give you a new perspective on an album you hadn't thought about before.
